meta.title: Andrea Boonyarungsrit — Product Leader & Mentor, Trust & Safety & AI/ML
meta.description: Product Leader. Trust & Safety, AI/ML, positive play, social experiences, gaming, social platforms, and livestreaming at scale. Ex-Twitter, BIGO LIVE.

hero.headline: Hi, I'm Andrea!
hero.subheadline: I build Trust & Safety, and social experiences for communities at scale for gaming and social platforms.
hero.bio: I'm a product leader at Activision on positive play, social, and trust & safety domains, shipping AI/ML for content moderation and healthier voice and text experiences for the Call of Duty franchise. Previously I led content moderation tools at Twitter and communities & creator growth at BIGO LIVE.
hero.highlights: Outside of work, I'm into rock climbing (sport, lead), running, traveling, cooking (mostly healthy meals), live music, and building with AI. I aim to do or try something new weekly.
hero.locationLine: Raised in Bangkok 🇹🇭 currently in Los Angeles 🇺🇸

items.title: Andrea Boonyarungsrit Portfolio Site
items.description: I first shipped a frontend-only version in Bolt in early 2025. In 2026 I rebuilt it in Claude Code inside Cursor as a static Astro site with JSON-driven content and Netlify Forms wired so the same workspace can pull from Andrea OS and my evolving Life OS context. The goal isn’t a one-and-done launch, it’s a site I can keep iterating on with grounded suggestions as my positioning and projects change.

items.title: Music Discovery Map
items.description: Interactive map where proximity means musical similarity. Search an artist, explore related acts on a React + ReactFlow graph, with live data from the Spotify Web API via a small Node/Express backend. I shipped the first version in several hours with Replit Agent 3 (after earlier experiments with Bolt and Claude Code in Cursor). The hardest part was tuning similarity so discovery still felt intuitive.

items.title: Watchlist for Movie Discovery
items.description: Built a working movie discovery app with a watchlist feature in approximately 20 minutes using Claude Code in the Cursor terminal. Leveraged Plan mode to break down the development plan, confirming each step before coding to maintain high quality with tests, clean commits, and clear documentation. Successfully created a live prototype running on localhost.

items.title: Andrea Life OS
items.description: Built a personal life operating system with custom slash commands and sub-agents to automate daily tasks. Features /daily-brief for personalized news, /mentorship-tracker for managing mentees, /brain-dump-analysis for extracting insights from thoughts, and adaptive learning that evolves with my interests and goals.

items.title: Positive Play Strategy & Measurement
items.when: 2025 • Call of Duty: Black Ops 7, Call of Duty: Black Ops 6, Call of Duty: Warzone
items.description: Architected Call of Duty Positive Play as a 0→1 franchise strategy, shifting from moderation-only to proactive, player-facing design. Established a measurement framework to identify prosocial voice, text and gameplay signals that correlate with higher re-engagement, and used that to prioritize where to invest first.

items.title: Voice Chat Enhancements
items.when: 2024 • Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III, Call of Duty: Warzone
items.description: Led development of voice chat and enforcement improvements while sustaining competitive spirit. Publicly reported results include a combined 67% reduction in repeat offenders after improved voice enforcement in June 2024, 80% of enforced players not re-offending (July 2024), and exposure to disruptive voice chat dropping by 43% since January 2024.

items.title: AI-Powered Voice Moderation System
items.when: 2023 • Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III, Call of Duty: Warzone
items.description: Led launch of Call of Duty’s first in-game AI voice chat moderation system, with a public rollout beginning in North America (beta) in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II and expanding to a global release in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III and Call of Duty: Warzone. This system proactively identifies and enforces against disruptive speech in real time.

items.title: Community Engagement Features
items.description: Led North America GTM strategy of Communities in BIGO LIVE, enabling users to create and manage online communities, and creators to build a following or grow their existing fanbase. Increased feature adoption by 320% and first three-month engagement by 24%.

items.title: Creator Features
items.description: Led the North America re-launch of Fans Group in BIGO LIVE, enabling creators to build and engage with their fanbase, and monetize their livestreaming content with subscription tiers. Increased feature adoption by 31% and first three-month engagement by 20%.

items.title: Prosocial Behavior Detection in Player Game Chat
items.description: Co-developed a three-stage human–AI pipeline to define, label, and deploy prosocial behavior classifiers where no established ground truth existed, including a human–LLM disagreement loop and a two-tier inference system that reduced inference costs by ~70% while maintaining ~0.90 precision.

items.title: Self-Anchored Attention Model for Prosocial Text Chat
items.description: Co-developed an automated system to detect and classify prosocial behavior in in-game text chat at scale; contributed product direction for a self-anchored attention model improving classification accuracy by ~7.9% in low-data settings.

items.title: Impact of AI Voice Moderation on the Call of Duty Player Experience
items.description: Co-authored a case study on deploying AI-powered voice chat moderation at Call of Duty scale with Modulate, covering system rollout, measurement approach, and lessons learned.

items.title: The Importance of Safe Online Communities
items.description: Panel discussion as part of the Activision-wide Press Pause series. We chat about the importance of communities and representation in gaming, and what we are doing in our respective fields to create more welcoming online spaces.

items.title: Tackling Disruptive Behavior: A Success Story
items.description: Presentation as part of the Activision-wide Call of Duty Summit, discussing how a grassroots disruptive behavior approach evolved into an industry-leading effort for the Call of Duty franchise, and impact to the community.

items.title: Inspiring the Next Generation of Leaders
items.description: Guest panel as part of the Activision and Determined to Succeed (DTS) partnership (non-profit empowering underserved LA youth to graduate college), sharing paths to gaming and how product experiences and features are built.

items.title: Building Healthy Online Communities
items.description: Lightning talk as part of the Demonware Summit, discussing how to identify and discourage disruptive behavior, and encourage prosocial behavior, including launched product experiences and impact on the community.

items.title: Careers in Gaming
items.when: 2023 • University of Southern California (USC) - Los Angeles, CA
items.description: All-women guest panel discussion as part of the Activision and Frost Equity Initiative partnership Hispanic Heritage Month STEM Event. We discuss careers in gaming, how to thrive in gaming in a male-dominated industry.

mentorship.title: Product Mentorship
mentorship.ctaTitle: Ready to level up your PM skills in the age of AI?
copy: Still mastering core product skills separates good PMs from great ones. Remote work with distributed teams in the Gen AI era has taught me that outcomes hinge on fundamentals: product sense, strategy and roadmap, thoughtful prioritization that fits your unique context, stakeholder management, and iterative development.

What sets my mentorship apart is my commitment to practical, unfiltered guidance: actionable feedback that helps you grow. I've mentored many PMs through the early career crunch, from building confidence to influencing without authority.
Are you an APM or PM who wants to accelerate through stronger PM craft (including using AI for prototyping and 10x-ing core PM work and productivity)?
helpList: Develop skills to ship features from concept to completion with confidence
Create measurable success metrics and demonstrate your impact
Navigate cross-functional collaboration to avoid roadblocks
expectList: Evaluate your current PM skill gaps and prioritize your top goals
Collaborative 1:1 doc to sustain accountability and track progress
Timely, direct feedback to get you unstuck

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: I'm open to new opportunities, collaborations, and speaking engagements. Email me at andreaboonyarungsrit@gmail(dot)com and let's talk!

items.quote: Andrea is a genuinely caring mentor who takes the time to understand my unique values, strengths, and areas for growth. She helped me craft a personalized success roadmap and offered insightful guidance. Our weekly syncs were always motivating and empowering, giving me the clarity and confidence to navigate my transition from business analyst to product manager. Thanks to our three months of joint effort, I've successfully landed a role as an AI Product Manager. I'm deeply grateful for Andrea's mentorship, encouragement, and constant presence throughout this journey.
items.author: Sonia

items.quote: Andrea helped me a lot during our time of mentorship. I looked for this mentorship as career change path, from more Game Development and Game Design roles to Product Management. Her experience was a really solid in the area and guided me to understand not only the implications of Product management in video games but also how to guide my former experience, in crafting a solid base to look on, and progress through this path.
items.author: Simón

items.quote: Thank you Andrea for the interesting chat, and for being so kind and available in solving my doubts and providing actionable feedback. I'll book another slot later in the future!
items.author: Michele

items.quote: I am incredibly grateful to Andrea for her exceptional mentorship and guidance during my job-seeking journey. Her ability to deeply understand my challenges and offer tailored solutions was truly remarkable. She helped me identify key areas to focus on, both professionally and personally, and provided invaluable insights into the job market. Her thorough analysis of my resume and constructive feedback was instrumental in presenting my profile more effectively.
items.author: Mayank
